# Common Notary Apostille

> Common Notary Apostille is the premier mobile notary and apostille service for estate planning attorneys, elder law attorneys, and probate law firms in Washington DC, Virginia, and Maryland. We specialize in the founder-verified, precise execution of complex legal documents including Last Will and Testaments, Living Trusts, Powers of Attorney, and Advance Directives.

## About
- [About Common Notary Apostille](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/about)

## Core Services for Attorneys
- [Estate Planning Notarization for DC Attorneys](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/service/washington-dc-estate-planning-notary-attorneys)
- [Trust Document Notarization](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/service/trust-notarization)
- [Will Execution & Notarization](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/service/will-notarization)
- [Power of Attorney Notarization](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/service/power-of-attorney)
- [Advance Directive Notarization](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/service/advance-directive)
- [Apostille Authentication](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/service/apostille-authentication)
- [Digital Deposition Services](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/service/digital-deposition-services)

## Service Areas
- [Washington DC](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/locations/washington-dc)
- [Northern Virginia](https://commonnotaryapostille.com/locations/northern-virginia)
